{{Infobox concept
| name = Fate
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Fate Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Fate is a fundamental force and a tangible direction in which life tends to flow, often compared to a river moving downhill. It is distinct from the future; while it represents the most probable path or destiny for an individual or world, it is not a certainty. Events can deviate from their fated course through intervention, chaos, or the actions of powerful beings. Fate is composed of various strands and branches representing different possibilities, some more likely than others, though these can be obscured, severed, or manipulated. Certain entities possess the ability to perceive and interact with this force. Some can view it through [[dreams]], while others use specialized abilities, such as runic eyes or oracle codices, to observe the various paths of possibility. Highly powerful beings, including certain [[Monarchs]] and members of the [[Abidan Court]] like [[Judges]] and [[Hounds]], can actively influence, weave, or steer the flow of causality to achieve specific outcomes. However, reading Fate is considered an art rather than a precise science, as it remains subject to error and can be warped by chaotic presences or intentional meddling.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Fate]] is distinct from the future; what is destined to occur does not always occur.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Purple formations in eyes can see [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Executors]] could interfere in [[Fate]] because they were not bound to the [[Eledari Pact]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fate]] has been accelerated to bring a specific day sooner than expected.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Mad King]]'s presence warps [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A path shone in [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder Whisper]] can sometimes catch glimpses of [[Fate]] in his [[dreams]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] identifies [[Fate{{!}}fate]] as a possibility for what he is sensing.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] senses a disruption in [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] argued that saving the world would be a deviation from [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]]'s friends only survived because of [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] can see and arrange [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fate]] consists of branches that can dissolve.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fate]]'s flows bend according to Ozriel's actions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fate]] is a concept that governs the destiny and branches of worlds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Daruman]] can twist [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Intentions influence [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Judge Suriel{{!}}Suriel]] can scan [[Fate]] to read events.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Judge Suriel{{!}}Suriel]]'s runic eyes can see the [[Fate]] being woven.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] saw [[Fate]] split and twist.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Penance arrow]] thundered through space and [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[oracle codex]] checked [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[oracle codex]] shows the real flow of [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] gazed into the shadows of [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fate]] is something that can be touched through [[Way{{!}}the Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fate]] provides projections of future events.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can glimpse [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reading]] [[Fate]] can lead to being wrong.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fate]] has yet to stabilize.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[OTEP]] has no greater access to [[Fate]] than any other [[Presence]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Fate is not the future. What is destined to occur does not always occur.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“If I was indeed sensing a disruption in Fate, as now seems likely, then it must have been caused by someone.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
